generations.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means position j+1 maps to position i+1
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity % 2 == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    if max(cnt.values()) > 1:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, find permutation
    # p[i] = where does sorted_a[i] come from in a
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(a)}
    
    # p[i] means: the element at position i in sorted array comes from position p[i] in a
    p = [pos[sorted_a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    # Count cycles
    visited = [False] * n
    cycles = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycles += 1
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = p[j]
    
    # Even permutation iff (n - cycles) is even
    if (n - cycles) % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    from collections import defaultdict
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # For each value, positions in a and in sorted_a
    pos_in_a = defaultdict(list)
    pos_in_sorted = defaultdict(list)
    
    for i, v in enumerate(a):
        pos_in_a[v].append(i)
    for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a):
        pos_in_sorted[v].append(i)
    
    # Build permutation: perm[i] = where element at position i in a goes in sorted_a
    perm = [0] * n
    has_dup = False
    for v in pos_in_a:
        pa = pos_in_a[v]
        ps = pos_in_sorted[v]
        if len(pa) >= 2:
            has_dup = True
        for i, j in zip(pa, ps):
            perm[i] = j
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    parity %= 2
    
    if parity == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        if has_dup:
            print("YES")
        else:
            print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means position j+1 maps to position i+1
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    print("YES" if parity % 2 == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    if max(cnt.values()) > 1:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # All distinct, find permutation
    # p[i] = where does sorted_a[i] come from in a
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(a)}
    
    # p[i] means: the element at position i in sorted array comes from position p[i] in a
    p = [pos[sorted_a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    # Count cycles
    visited = [False] * n
    cycles = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycles += 1
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = p[j]
    
    # Even permutation iff (n - cycles) is even
    if (n - cycles) % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    from collections import defaultdict
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # For each value, positions in a and in sorted_a
    pos_in_a = defaultdict(list)
    pos_in_sorted = defaultdict(list)
    
    for i, v in enumerate(a):
        pos_in_a[v].append(i)
    for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a):
        pos_in_sorted[v].append(i)
    
    # Build permutation: perm[i] = where element at position i in a goes in sorted_a
    perm = [0] * n
    has_dup = False
    for v in pos_in_a:
        pa = pos_in_a[v]
        ps = pos_in_sorted[v]
        if len(pa) >= 2:
            has_dup = True
        for i, j in zip(pa, ps):
            perm[i] = j
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += (cycle_len - 1) % 2
    
    parity %= 2
    
    if parity == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        if has_dup:
            print("YES")
        else:
            print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
